svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="组件库 Monorepo 分层" id="monorepo"> <mxGraphModel dx="-624" dy="-182" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="luban-ui Monorepo 分层与依赖方向" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="350" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apps_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;dashed=0;" value="apps/ (应用层)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="960" x="120" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app_main" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-ui
(主应用 / Demo / 联调)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="180" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app_story" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Storybook
(组件文档 / 预览)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="430" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app_e2e" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-ui-e2e
(Cypress E2E)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="680" y="105" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="Demo / 示例数据只放 apps,
不污染 packages" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="900" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pkg_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;dashed=0;" value="packages/ (对外发布的包)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="960" x="120" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pkg_lowcode" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-low-code
设计器 + 运行时 + schema
依赖: luban-base, vue, sortablejs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="280" x="160" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pkg_base" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-base
基础组件 (button/form/layout)
依赖: 仅 vue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="240" x="500" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pkg_utils" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="luban-utils
纯工具函数
依赖: 无 / tslib" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="220" x="800" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep1" edge="1" parent="1" source="app_main" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;" target="pkg_lowcode" value="引用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep2" edge="1" parent="1" source="app_story" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;" target="pkg_base" value="引用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep3" edge="1" parent="1" source="pkg_lowcode" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;" target="pkg_base" value="external 打包时不打包 base"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="root_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;dashed=1;" value="根目录配置(统一编排)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="960" x="120" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="root_nx" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="nx.json
任务图 / 缓存
@nx/vite, vitest,
cypress, eslint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="160" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="root_ts" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="tsconfig.base.json
strict: true
customConditions:
@luban-ui/source" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="400" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="root_pnpm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="pnpm-workspace.yaml
apps/*, packages/*" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="640" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="root_scripts" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="根 package.json
便捷脚本统一入口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="880" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rule" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="铁律:依赖只能自上而下,packages 不能反向依赖 apps; luban-base 不依赖任何 luban-* 包" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="960" x="120" y="595" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
